source: Official GitHub links explicitly indicated by paper text or Papers with Code official paper-mentioned flags
sourceLicense: CC-BY-SA-4.0 for Papers with Code archive entries; paper-text links come from existing scholarly metadata
matchingPolicy: Only display GitHub links that are explicit official paper links: direct GitHub URLs in paper abstract/metadata with code/repository availability context, or Papers with Code archive entries where githubOfficial and mentionedInPaper are both true. Broad title/arXiv code matches, third-party reimplementations, and metadata-only carryover links are excluded. Only GitHub URLs that remained reachable after direct link audit are retained. Only GitHub URLs that remained reachable after direct link audit are retained.
